mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, uid, data_source_id, instance_desc
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_ds_tag WHERE data_source_id = #{dsId} AND uid = #{uid} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM dm_ds_tag WHERE uid = #{uid} AND data_source_id in #{item} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE dm_ds_tag SET gmt_modified = now(), instance_desc = #{remark} WHERE data_source_id = #{dsId} AND uid = #{uid}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dm_ds_tag WHERE data_source_id = #{dsId} AND uid = #{uid}
mapper.update: UPDATE data_source_tag SET gmt_modified = now(), uid = #{uid}
